summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CryptoRadar enhanced BTC intelligence dashboard with new Open Interest and Funding Rate modules, enhanced Market Bias with next target and analysis text, and enhanced News with importance levels and descriptions. All features working correctly with proper API integration.
passed_tests: Market Bias card displays next target ($71,766) and analysis text
Open Interest card shows total OI ($35.5B), 1H/4H/24H changes, trend (STABLE), and exchange distribution (Binance 45%, OKX 20%, etc.)
Funding Rate card displays rate (+1.0500%), annualized rate (+11.5%), payer (Longs), sentiment (BULLISH), and overcrowded warning system
News cards show importance icons (⚡ Lightning, ℹ️ Info) and sentiment badges (bullish, neutral, bearish)
API /api/open-interest returns simulated data with proper structure including exchanges array
API /api/funding-rate returns simulated data with sentiment analysis and overcrowded detection
API /api/market/bias includes next_target and analysis_text fields
API /api/news returns importance (high/medium/low) and description fields
All analysis engines confirmed using real Kraken data (market status, candles, orderbook)
WebSocket price streaming working correctly with live updates
Real-time price display showing current BTC price with live indicator
Kraken data source validation for market data, orderbook analysis
CryptoCompare data source validation for news
Market Bias orderbook integration with real-time imbalance calculation
Support/Resistance levels include orderbook-based levels from Kraken
Liquidity analysis uses real orderbook data for cluster detection
Whale alerts detect real volume spikes from Kraken data
News sentiment analysis working with importance classification

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core features working, minor UI element selector improvements could be made)
